summary: Iteration 47 - UI Feature Tests: Company Logo Upload, Company Card Logo Display, Avatar Gallery Zoom. All 10 requested features verified and working correctly.

tests: Logo upload area found at top of modal (57px from modal top)
Logo upload area contains Image icon (SVG)
Logo upload area is clickable and triggers file input
Logo upload area visible and enabled
Company with logo_url shows tag (logo image)
Company without logo_url shows Building2 icon (SVG fallback)

avatar_gallery_zoom_hover.description: Hovering over avatar shows overlay with Maximize2 zoom icon

avatar_gallery_zoom_click.description: Clicking zoom icon opens fullscreen preview overlay

features_verified: Large avatar image displayed in center

avatar_preview_close_outside.description: Clicking outside the preview image closes the overlay

avatar_selection.description: Clicking avatar image selects it (golden border indicator)
avatar_selection.note: Fixed pointer-events issue with overlay to allow click-through to image

updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/PipelineView.jsx - Added pointer-events-none to avatar overlay div and pointer-events-auto to zoom button to fix avatar selection click-through issue
seed_data_creation: Test data injected via localStorage for companies (agentzz_companies) and avatars (agentzz_avatars) to verify features
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47: All three UI features verified working - 1) Company modal has logo upload area at top with data-testid='company-logo-upload', clicking triggers file upload. 2) Company cards show logo image when logo_url exists, otherwise Building2 icon fallback. 3) Avatar gallery supports hover-to-show zoom icon, click opens fullscreen overlay with close (X) button and download link. A minor fix was applied to add pointer-events-none to avatar overlay div to allow avatar selection click-through. localStorage keys: agentzz_companies, agentzz_avatars. Route: /marketing/studio.

features_tested_summary.feature_2_company_card_logo_display: PASSED - Cards show uploaded logo when logo_url exists, Building2 icon when no logo

features_tested_summary.feature_4_avatar_zoom_fullscreen_overlay: PASSED - Clicking zoom icon opens fullscreen preview with avatar image
features_tested_summary.feature_5_avatar_preview_close_button: PASSED - X button in overlay closes the preview
features_tested_summary.feature_6_avatar_preview_download_link: PASSED - Download link opens avatar URL in new tab
features_tested_summary.feature_7_avatar_preview_click_outside_c: PASSED - Clicking outside overlay closes it
features_tested_summary.feature_8_avatar_selection_still_works: PASSED - Clicking avatar image selects it with golden border
